title: Dede's stupid things
description: Random and stupid stuff i decided to make cuz i can
body:
### **Fabric version isnt currently being updated cuz fabric plugin doesnt work in new mcreator version**

Stuff currently in game:

-Normal brick, nothing unusual (definetely)

-Stick sword, deals 3 damage cuz its very cheap (you just need 5 sticks) and it has 10 uses

-The Block, just a random block

-Old stick sword from 1.0.0/1 - deals 1 damage, uncraftable unless you have older version, has infinite uses **(Fabric only)**

![Stick Sword Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e0a0b0a7938d70a1dbb7cacfebc727d5360c98.png)

![How to get Normal Brick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/638b526b76f3df774f8407b89ca608ce1feca7ce.png)

![Other way to get Normal Brick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc48c99ff7c7b7d005ec45f459b83a5af882583.png)

![How to get The Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a8619fcab730481b2a88f30848c648ebf7a7d6c.png)
